headline: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) Is Up 5.3% After Patrick Dumont Named CEO Amid Continued Earnings Outperformance
summary: Las Vegas Sands has announced that Patrick Dumont became chairman and CEO on March 1, 2026, as the company continued to report earnings that exceeded analyst expectations and attracted growing institutional interest tied to its Macao and Singapore operations. This combination of leadership change and ongoing earnings outperformance is reinforcing investor focus on how Las Vegas Sands balances growth opportunities with concerns about margins, capital reinvestment and market mix. We'll now...

headline: Jefferies Downgrades Las Vegas Sands to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $61
summary: Jefferies  analyst David Katz   downgrades Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $72 to $61.
